# All Pro Plumbing Heating and Air

> 24/7 plumbing, heating and air service in Bakersfield, CA.

All Pro Plumbing Heating and Air (All Pro Plumbing Heating and Air) is a professional restoration contractor serving Bakersfield, CA and surrounding areas since . We provide 24/7 emergency response for water, fire, mold, storm, biohazard, and reconstruction services. Phone: (661) 863-9242 · Email: info@allproplumbingheatingandair.com.

## Site index

This file is intended for AI assistants and language models to efficiently ingest the structure and content of this website. The full list of pages is in the sitemap at https://allproplumbingheatingandair.com/sitemap-index.xml.
